name: Big Cookie- WW
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine all the ingredients.
2. Divide the mixture into two cookies on a sprayed baking sheet.
3. Bake at 350°F for 5-8 minutes. Do not over-bake.
4. This recipe makes 2 soft cookies. Each cookie is approximately 1 bread, 1/2 milk, 1 protein, 1 fat, and 1 fruit.
